description:
The github-issues plugin can create a duplicate balls task by re-ingesting a closed GH issue that was itself originally mirrored *from* balls.

CONCRETE OBSERVED LOOP (mudbungie/balls):
1. bl-cb4e created. github-issues mirrored it as GH issue #37 with the bl tag baked into the title: 'Vendor a minimal SHA-1; drop sha1 + hex crates [bl-cb4e]'.
2. bl-cb4e delivered (519d4dd) and closed; GH#37 closed 2026-05-20T06:38:14Z.
3. ~8 min later (06:46:56Z), a sync re-ingested closed GH#37 back into balls as a brand-new ball bl-279f — same title, same body, no parent link, no awareness that #37 is already mirrored from bl-cb4e.
4. Plugin then pushed bl-279f's tag back to GH#37 so its title is now '... [bl-cb4e] [bl-279f]' — the loop is observable in the title.

WHY IT MATTERS: another agent will pick up the duplicate (it appears in 'bl ready') and either redo finished work or, at minimum, has to recognise + close it. Worst case: if a duplicate is created, closed, re-ingested, repeat — bounded only by humans/agents catching it.

ROOT CAUSE (likely): ingest path keys on 'is this GH issue already tracked as an open ball?' rather than 'is this GH issue already tracked as ANY ball (open or closed)?'. Once bl-cb4e archived, the external mapping was no longer visible to the ingest loop, so the closed issue looked new.

SCOPE:
(a) On ingest, refuse to create a new ball for a GH issue whose number is already recorded in any ball's external.github-issues.issue.number (including archived/closed balls reconstructable from balls/tasks history).
(b) Defense in depth: if the GH issue title already contains a [bl-xxxx] marker that resolves locally, skip ingest and (optionally) update the existing ball instead.
(c) Add a regression test: create ball -> mirror to GH issue -> close ball -> run sync -> assert no new ball is created.

EVIDENCE: bl-279f (now closed) carries 'external.github-issues.issue.number: 37, source: github, state: closed, synced_at: 2026-05-20T06:46:56'; GH#37 title is 'Vendor a minimal SHA-1; drop sha1 + hex crates [bl-cb4e] [bl-279f]'.
title: github-issues: closed mirrored issue re-ingested as duplicate ball
